subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the good-pleasure of the Friend! The sun of the celestial sphere hath become hidden, and Saturn hath vanished from the horizon of its mansion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای حضرت دوست آفتاب سپهر کیهان متواری شده است و کیوان از افق ایوان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
